abilities: You need only ask for my help.
Your fate is in my grasp.
A cure for all that ails.
Your end is within my reach.
Surrender to my will! (self and allies)
chatter: Humanity is shackled. I will find the key.
Much lies in store. Let us see to it.
Push your limits. Nothing breaks that I cannot mend.
The world evolves, and so must we with it.
Your worth is a hypothesis. Prove it.
If it must be done, let it be done quickly.
Let us keep our questionable choices to a minimum.
Let us go on to the end.
Victory grows more certain by the minute.
We hold the advantage. Shall we keep it?
Another setback and all will be lost.
One more mistake, and we fail.
We cannot tolerate any more missteps.
We must reverse the course that we are on.
If we're hoping to win, now's the time.
It all comes down to this.
Prepare yourselves for the decisive battle.
This fight is all that remains.
Evolution is a painful path to walk.
Progress is seldom won with ease.
Collaboration will make this task easier...
I will make use of this.
This will give us an edge.
It seems our tests were inconclusive.
The dead ought to remain so.
Always with a touch of the dramatic. (witnessing Reaper use Death Blossom)
This was the only plausible outcome.
call-outs: The enemy has placed a turret here.
In mere moments, we will reign triumphant.
Victory grows ever further from their reach.
Time is of the essence. Make haste!
We must strike before they can resist.
eliminations: A meager sacrifice.
A time to heal... and a time to kill.
As expected.
Fall in vain.
In chaos lies opportunity.
It's settled.
Nothing remains.
Such is the price of progress.
Thank you for your contributions.
That will be all.
Unremarkable.
Your resilience is lacking.
Swift as the wind... and dim as the night. (eliminating Genji )
A procedure gone awry. (eliminating Illari )
I'll ensure you are not the last of your kind. (eliminating Illari )
There is but one cure for madness. (eliminating Junkrat or Sigma )
Such misplaced optimism. (eliminating Lifeweaver )
*chuckle* You should have kept running. (eliminating Lifeweaver )
The milk of human kindness has spoiled. (eliminating Lúcio , Mei , Mercy or Tracer )
What have you become? (eliminating Reaper )
All experiments must come to an end... (eliminating Reaper or Widowmaker )
Oh... but you are lost without me. (eliminating Reaper or Widowmaker )
Do not meddle in my affairs. (eliminating Sombra )
And so the empire falls. (eliminating Vendetta )
A life best left forgotten. (eliminating Venture )
The specimen has been... disposed of. (eliminating Winston or Wrecking Ball )
Expect the unexpected.
Mind your surroundings.
Perhaps next time you should not stand in the way of the orb.
Yours is never the upper hand. (on low HP)
As above, so below. (eliminating airborne enemy)
All that trouble... and for what? (eliminating enemy using ultimate)
This power is intriguing, Amari! (Nano-Boosted by friendly Ana )
Even heroes are cursed with mortality. (eliminating Mercy using Valkyrie)
At least your body is well-preserved. (eliminating Reaper using Death Blossom)
Back in your cage, Doctor! (eliminating Sigma using Gravitic Flux)
*chuckle* Moths to the flame. (Eliminating an enemy in graviton surge)
More swimmers in the deep end of the data pool.
Persistence is always rewarded.
All your might will not stop me .
Nuisances, and nothing more.
Must I do your work as well as my own, Gabriel? (with Reaper on the team)
The enemy team has been vanquished.
We've driven them to extinction.
Now... we have been equalized.
The future beckons. You will not interfere.
Do not rely on my generosity. It is fleeting.
You could still be of use to me.
Are your thorns just for show? (saving Lifeweaver )
Must you be coddled, Pruksamanee? (saving Lifeweaver )
Seems I've made a habit of saving your life, Gabriel. (saving Reaper )
Down.
Hmph. Arrogance.
Reckless disregard for life and limb.
Subdued.
Try using your head along with your fists. (eliminating Doomfist )
A rose clipped too soon. (eliminating Lifeweaver )
Can't charm your way out of this one. (eliminating Lifeweaver )
It is often one's mouth breaks her nose. (eliminating Sombra )
*laughs*
Gravity compels us all.
Your trajectory leaves much to be desired.
Enemy turret is no more.
I admire your efficacy.
Your actions are... satisfactory.
Your assistance is appreciated.
I respect those who hold to their values... (to Doomfist )
Hmph. A stinging nettle. (to Lifeweaver )
I see why biolight is so desirable. (to Lifeweaver )
You're rather heartless for a man with two of them. (to Mauga )
*chuckle* Mind your hypocrisy, Doctor. (to Mercy )
And to think you squandered your power... (to Reaper or Widowmaker )
Truly inspiring work, Doctor. (to Sigma )
About time you were of use. (to Sombra )
interactions: Moira : Does it bother you that you've taken as many lives as you've saved? Ana : I don't mind killing monsters. But go on, keep pushing me.
Moira : Aggression is no substitute for ability. Ashe : Reckon that's true. Good thing I have both.
Baptiste : Healing and hurting... hm. I guess we're not that different. Moira : Hmph. I assure you, we are nothing alike.

Cassidy : Hey there, Moira. How've you been? Moira : Busier than you, I'd assume. Cassidy : * chuckles * I missed you, too. You look great, by the way. Moira : Same saccharine tongue, same empty head.
Moira : *sigh* What a nauseating bout of déjà vu. Cassidy : Yep. Working with you has always made me sick. Reaper : Are you planning to whine the whole time... again? Genji : *sigh*
Moira : This foolish mission is taking time away from my experiments, Akande. Doomfist : Think of it as... field work.
Doomfist : I have yet to see a report on your latest experiment. Moira : It's making progress. Doomfist : Our timeline is non-negotiable. Moira : Keep interrupting me, surely that'll expedite things.
D.Va : How can you experiment on those cute little rabbits? Moira : Easily.
Echo : Dr. Liao was not fond of you. Moira : Was she any fonder of you? Echo : Of course. I was her life's work. Moira : It seemed to me she was far more taken with your predecessor .
Moira : I could have rebuilt you without all that metal. Genji : And left me a monster, like other creations? Moira : That is a matter of perspective.
Hanzo : I have heard of your experiments. There is no honor in what you do. Moira : Shimada, where do I know that name from? Oh, that's right... the family of criminals.
Illari : Don't you ever feel remorse for the pain you have caused? Moira : Pain makes one stronger. You should know that better than anyone.
Moira : Intelligent, adaptable... You have the makings of a perfect test subject. Jetpack Cat : *angry meows* Moira : Hm. Though an added dose of obedience would be appreciated.

Junkrat : You looking for a lab assistant? I'm great with chemicals! Moira : Certainly. We would begin by testing your tolerance for pain. Junkrat : What's pain have to do with science? Moira : Everything , my strange little friend.
Moira : I have always wondered what being born in space would do to the human body. Juno : I... do not like the way you are looking at me...
Kiriko: You have a band-aid? Moira: Who exactly do you think I am? Kiriko: Someone who carries band-aids? Eh, guess not.
Kiriko: Eugh... You look cheery. Moira: *scoff* As cheery as you are significant.

Moira : There is always room for brilliance at Oasis . Lifeweaver : I'm honored, but I have some reservations about your... Oh, what's the word? Moira : Atrocities? Inhumanity? "Crimes against nature"? Lifeweaver : *chuckles* Any of those will do.

Lifeweaver : What is your fascination with artificial decay? Moira : To reverse entropy, we must tame it. Lifeweaver : But inflicting it on yourself? You're withering away! Moira : I've always thrived under a deadline.
Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Moira : Scolopendra gigantea. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Moira : You are remembering to take your supplements? Mauga : Look at these guns and ask me again.

Mauga : Hey-hey, hey! Looks like my favorite doctor stuck around with Talon ! Moira : As did you, unsurprisingly. I don't believe any other organization could tolerate you. Mauga : Aw, you're just sayin' that! Moira : I assure you: I mean every word.

Moira : I've read your report on cryogenically preserving severed appendages. I'd be happy to assist in your research. Mei : No thank you. I don't think our methodologies are very aligned. Moira : Of course. I've heard you prefer working alone. Come now, doctor. I was only hoping to lend a hand.
Mercy : I'd rather wait a century for progress than cause the harm you have. Moira : What a joy it must be... to feel entitled to patience.
Mercy : How are you funding your crimes against humanity these days? Moira : My old friends, "innovation" and "imagination". A shame you've never met them.
Moira : How fares your research, Dr. Ziegler? Making much progress through all that "red tape"? Mercy : It's called the Hippocratic Oath, doctor. Ring any bells?
Mercy : I've read about the genetic therapy they put you through. It sounds unpleasant. Wrecking Ball : It was, but ignorance was worse. Moira : Don't bother. Reason is lost on her.
Moira : So, sweet Idina has grown into a domineering beast. Orisa : My name is Orisa. You would be wise to remember it.

Ramattra: Your... willingness, to experiment on your own kind... fascinates me, Doctor. Why do you do it? Moira: I'm surprised you have to ask. We have an enemy in common. Ramattra: Overwatch ? Moira: No. Mortality.
Reaper : Is there nothing you can do for this pain? Moira : Think of it as... fuel beneath the flames of your vengeance. Reaper : *grumbles*
Moira : Don't die on me, now. You're one of my finest experiments. Reaper : Flattery will get you the grave.

Reaper : You really think Antonio Bartalotti 's daughter won't take out everyone involved in the Venice Incident ? *scoff* Moron. Moira : Only one man pulled the trigger that night. I'd be more concerned for his well-being.

Reinhardt : Moira! I should crush you like a bug for what you've done. Moira : Did you know that certain centipedes kill prey fifteen times their size? Reinhardt : What are you saying? Moira : I'm advising my prey not to test me.
Moira : Are you breathing petrol, or something more interesting? Roadhog : Want some? Moira : No, thank you. I'll just observe.
Sigma : In the field, doctor? Testing a hypothesis, perhaps? Moira : With the rate at which our colleagues get injured, I expect I'll be testing my patience.

Moira : You've been rather quiet today, Doctor. I've gotten a lot done. Sigma : Can a fish that never sees the surface know it's under water? I wonder if frogs dream of ponds. If one built a violin of Planck length, could one play music into another universe? Someone must build a particle collider around the sun! Moira : Ugh. There it goes.

Sigma : Can one know that one knows nothing? Can a single grain of sand differentiate between heap and not-heap? If the universe is a simulation, why aren't there more elephant seals? Moira : It thrills me to put aside my preparations and humor your brilliant inquiries, Doctor. It thrills me! Sigma : Kind words. Thank you!
Moira : Have you enjoyed your time away with the fairies, Dr. De Kuiper? Sigma : They do make lovely conversation.
Sigma : If you know what you're looking for, inquiry is unnecessary. But if you don't know... how do you inquire? Moira : Ugh. Somehow even more tiresome than the chicken and the egg.

Sombra : You and jefe need to stop frying Sigma 's brain! Moira : I'm trying to help your little friend. Sombra : *scoff* And yourself. Moira : Yes, let's discuss morality. And hypocrisy, while we're at it.
Sombra : What are you up to, Moira? Moira : Wouldn't you like to know? Sombra : Fine. I'll hack you later.
Sombra : You ever broken patient confidentiality? Moira : I can't say. Sombra : You're good ...
Sombra : This carpal tunnel's slowing down my WPM. Moira : I can fix it, and more. Sombra : Uh, how about just taping it up? Moira : Offer's on the table.
Sombra : You stopping in to see Max ? I love how you make him squirm. Moira : Mm, it's amusing. I don't even experiment on omnics . Sombra : ...Yet? Moira : *laughs* Yet.
Moira : It seems your little band is back together. For the moment, at least. Tracer : Overwatch is here to stay. And we're coming for you next.
Venture: You're a geneticist? If you're up for it, I bet our bioarchaeology team would love to have you! Moira: The dead tell intriguing tales. But my interest lies with the living.
Moira : You've been distant lately, Lacroix... Widowmaker : By your design. Moira : Pondering anything unusual? Dangerous? Widowmaker : No. Never.
Widowmaker : Our foes make such a nuisance of themselves. Moira : Is that an emotion I detect, Lacroix?
Winston : Anyone want to hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? Moira : Na . Winston : *chuckles*

Zarya : You're the one making... abominations. Moira : Hmm. As the strongest woman in the world, you must see merit in pushing humanity's limits. Zarya : All I see is a fool, mistaking a strong body for a gullible mind.
Zenyatta : You have an intense gaze, Doctor. Moira : I am thinking on how best to utilize you. Zenyatta : In the coming battle, you mean? Moira : Perhaps...
map-specific: I cannot believe I am being subjected to this... cacophony. And they say my actions are unethical.
No. I am not enjoying this.
Seneca said that the cause of fear is ignorance. If only anyone had listened.
They say a banshee haunts these grounds ... but those are just fairytales.
A dreamer is one who can only find his way by moonlight, and his punishment is that he sees the dawn before the rest of the world.
We are all in the gutter, but some of us are looking at the stars.
I do have a bit of experience, after all.
Yet another stretch of cloudless skies and idyllic ocean views. Wonderful.
I tend to avoid places this... crowded.
Hm. Beings born of science seeking answers in faith.
Overwatch ... keepers of the status quo.
